title: Yazılım Geliştirici (Backend)
description: Yazılım Geliştirici (Backend) 🚀 Verimor Telekom'un backend altyapısını inşa edecek, VoIP sistemlerinde iz bırakacak, modern AI destekli araçlarla hızlı hareket eden kıdemli bir yazılım geliştirici arıyoruz. 📍 Pozisyon: Backend Geliştirici 📍 Lokasyon: İstanbul – Kağıthane 📍 Çalışma şekli: Hibrit veya Yerinde 📍 Başlangıç: En kısa sürede 📍 Sektör: Telekom, VoIP, API Biz Kimiz? Verimor, BTK lisanslı bir telekom operatörü olarak Türkiye'de santral ve iletişim altyapısı hizmetleri sunmaktadır. Ölçeklenebilir, yüksek performanslı ve gerçek zamanlı iletişim çözümleri geliştiren mühendislik odaklı bir ekibiz. Ürünlerimizi büyütmeye ve backend altyapımızı güçlendirmeye devam ediyoruz. Pozisyon Hakkında Backend tarafında güçlü, üretken ve modern AI destekli geliştirme araçlarına (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot vb.) aşina  bir Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirici arıyoruz. Bu, doğrudan ürüne dokunan, backend sistemleri kuran ve ölçeklendiren,   uygulamalı bir pozisyondur. Küçük ve dinamik bir ekiple birlikte hızlı teslimat yapacak, sistem performansını artıracak ve ölçeklenebilir mimariler tasarlayacaksınız. 🌟 Neler Yapacaksınız? Temel ürünlerimizi besleyen backend servisleri ve API'leri geliştirecek, ölçeklendireceksiniz. VoIP altyapısı (FreeSWITCH, Kamailio, Sippy) üzerinde geliştirme ve entegrasyon çalışmaları yapacaksınız. Gerçek zamanlı işleme ve yüksek hacimli iş yüklerini kaldıracak sistemler tasarlayacaksınız. Platformun performansını, güvenilirliğini ve ölçeklenebilirliğini iyileştireceksiniz. Veri akışları, asenkron işleme ve sistem entegrasyonları üzerinde çalışacaksınız. REST API tasarımı ve geliştirmesi yapacaksınız. Altyapı ve dağıtım süreçlerine katkıda bulunacaksınız. AI kodlama araçlarını kullanarak geliştirme süreçlerini hızlandıracaksınız. Mimari ve teknik kararlarda ekiple yakın iş birliği yapacaksınız. 🔍 Kimleri Arıyoruz? Backend geliştirme alanında en az 2 yıl deneyim Canlıya alınmış, production ortamında çalışan sistemler geliştirmiş olmak. Ruby on Rails, Go veya JavaScript dillerinden en az birinde güçlü deneyim. PostgreSQL ile veritabanı tasarımı ve yönetimi konusunda yetkinlik. REST API geliştirme deneyimi Docker ve Debian tabanlı ortamlarda çalışma deneyimi. VS Code veya CLIE benzeri araçlar ile AI destekli kodlama araçlarını (Cursor, Claude Code, Copilot vb.) rahatça kullanabilmek. Küçük ve hızlı hareket eden bir ekipte özerk çalışabilme becerisi. 🌟 Bunlar da Varsa Güzel Olur VoIP teknolojilerine aşinalık (FreeSWITCH, Kamailio, Sippy, SIP protokolü) Gerçek zamanlı sistemler veya event-driven mimarilerle deneyim Mesaj kuyrukları, cache mekanizmaları ve asenkron iş akışlarıyla çalışmış olmak Düşük seviye performans optimizasyonu veya sistem programlama deneyimi Telekom sektöründe çalışmış olmak 💬 Verimor'da Seni Ne Bekliyor? Temel backend sistemlerini sıfırdan kurma ve büyütme fırsatı Mühendislik öncelikli, hızlı tempolu bir çalışma ortamı Modern teknoloji yığını ve AI destekli geliştirme süreçleri VoIP ve telekom dünyasında teknik derinlik kazanma imkânı Modern, ulaşımı kolay bir ofis Ve tabii ki iyi kahve ve iyi insanlar ☕ 📩 Süreç Nasıl İlerliyor? 1. Başvurunu inceliyoruz ve kısa sürede seninle iletişime geçiyoruz. 2. Tanışma ve kültürel uyum görüşmesi yapıyoruz. 3. Gerekirse kısa bir değerlendirme talep ediyoruz. 4. Uygun bulursak, seni Verimor ekibine katılmaya davet ediyoruz! Hazırsan, seni tanımak için sabırsızlanıyoruz. Hadi gel, Verimor’da birlikte iletişimi kolaylaştıralım!

title: Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı (Backend / .Net)
description: Mikrogrup olarak, hızla büyüyen ve gelişen organizasyonumuzda birlikteliğin gücüne inanarak cesaretle adım atan, işine tutkuyla sarılarak liderlik eden “Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştime Uzmanı / Backend Developer (.Net)” rolündeki ekip arkadaşımızı arıyoruz! #mikrogrupseninlegüzel Biz kimiz? Mikrogrup şirketleri, Mikro Yazılım, Zirve Yazılım, Paraşüt, Shopside, E-Mükellef ve MevzuatTR'den oluşmaktadır. Şirketlerimizin ürün yelpazesi; KOBİ'lerden, mikro işletmelere ve oradan mali müşavirlere kadar uzanmakta ve temel özelliği ise; mikro, küçük ve orta ölçekli işletmelere yönelik, kurulumu ve kullanımı kolay, entegre ve kullanıcı ihtiyaçlarına göre şekillendirilebilen modüler ürün ve hizmetler sunmaktır. Bu, Mikrogrup yaklaşımının yarattığı farktır. Başarımızın bir sonucu olarak, 2023 yılında İtalya'nın dev yazılım geliştirme şirketi TeamSytem, Mikrogrup'a stratejik ortak olmuştur. Hızla büyüyen ve gelişen organizasyonumuzda, heyecanımıza ortak olacak, cesur adımlar atacak, birleşme gücüne inanacak ve işinde tutkuyla liderlik gösterecek “Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştime Uzmanı / Backend Developer (.Net)” rolüne yeni ekip arkadaşımızı arıyoruz! #mikrogrupseninlegüzel! Çalışma Prensiplerimiz Değerlerimize ve hedeflerimize olan bağlılığımızla, iş yapma biçimimizi belirleyen çalışma prensiplerimizi seninle paylaşmaktan gurur duyuyoruz: #BİRLİKTELİKseninleguzel #CESARETseninleguzel #TUTKUseninleguzel #LİDERLİKseninleguzel Bu prensipler; sürekli gelişim, etik davranış ve takım çalışmasını temel alarak, başarımızın anahtarını oluşturuyor. Hangi yetkinlikleri bekliyoruz? Benzer pozisyonda en az 5 yıl iş deneyimine sahip, Web tabanlı uygulama geliştirme konusunda deneyimli, C#, .NET Framework, .NET 5 ve üzeri teknolojilere hakim, REST API ve SOAP servislerinin geliştirilmesi, entegrasyonu ve yönetimi konusunda deneyimli, Entity Framework, Entity Framework Core vb. ORM araçlarıyla çalışmış, Nesne Yönelimli Programlama (OOP) ve Tasarım Desenleri (Design Patterns) konularında bilgili, SOLID prensiplerini benimseyen ve uygulayan, Kodlama standartları, temiz kod ve kod kalitesi konularına önem veren, MS SQL Server ve PostgreSQL gibi ilişkisel veri tabanları konusunda deneyimli, RabbitMQ, Kafka gibi mesajlaşma altyapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi olan, Redis, MongoDB gibi NoSQL veri tabanları hakkında bilgi sahibi, Microservice, container mimarileri konusunda bilgi ve deneyim sahibi, Takım çalışmasına yatkın, iletişim becerileri yüksek, Teknik dokümanları takip edebilecek seviyede İngilizce bilgisi olan Sana neler sunuyoruz? Teknoloji sektörünün nabzını tutan; yenilikçi, enerjik ve destekleyici bir ekip ile çalışma imkanı, Çalışma hayatını dengeli yönetebilmen için Hibrit çalışma sistemi, Farklı kültürlere saygılı ve kapsayıcı bir çalışma ortamı , %50 kadın %50 erkek çalışan oranımız ile eşit ve dengeli bir çalışma ortamı,Bize özel detaylara sahip, sürekli kapsamını genişletmeye odaklandığımız yan haklar, 8000’den fazla gelişim ve eğitim içeriği sunduğumuz, mobilden de 7 gün 24 saat erişim sağlayabildiğin Mikrogrup Akademi, Her bir ekip arkadaşımızın esenliği Mikrogrup’ta değerli; doğum günü izni, sağlık sigortası ve wellness destekleri, Uzaktan çalışmanın etkisini “birlikteliğimizle” azalttığımız Happy Hour larımız, Başvurunu almak için sabırsızlanıyoruz! Başvuruların tümünü inceledikten sonra görüşme sürecine geçeceğiz. Ekibimizin bir parçası olmanı dört gözle bekliyoruz!

title: PHP/Laravel Yazılım Uzmanı & Mobil APP
description: Oyuncu ve model ajansı olarak faaliyet gösteren yapımız bünyesinde; ajans yönetim panelleri, oyuncu–model başvuru sistemleri, kullanıcı ve içerik yönetimi altyapıları ile web ve mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerini birlikte yürütecek deneyimli bir Yazılım Uzmanı ile freelance ve proje bazlı iş birliği hedeflenmektedir. Bu pozisyon tam zamanlı bir işe alım değildir. Belirli projelerde, uzun vadeli ve sürdürülebilir bir iş birliği anlayışıyla çalışılması amaçlanmaktadır. Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde aktif olarak geliştirilmekte ve güncellenmektedir. Ayrıca; oyuncu ve model ajansı dışında, reklam ve dijital projeler üreten ayrı bir yapımız bulunmaktadır. Dileyen adaylarla bu yapı altında da ek freelance yazılım projeleri gerçekleştirilebilecektir. Görev ve Sorumluluklar Mevcut web tabanlı yönetim panellerinin geliştirilmesi ve yeniden yapılandırılması AngularJS tabanlı admin panel altyapılarının bakımı, geliştirilmesi ve modern backend mimarileri ile entegrasyonu Mevcut backend yapılarının Laravel framework’ü ile yeniden kurgulanması ve iyileştirilmesi Oyuncu & model başvuru sistemleri, ajans içi yönetim panelleri ve özel modüllerin geliştirilmesi Web projelerle entegre çalışan mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde aktif rol almak Mobil uygulamalar için gerekli backend servislerinin ve RESTful API’lerin geliştirilmesi AWS veya benzeri cloud sunucu altyapılarında kurulum, taşıma, yönetim ve performans optimizasyonu Üçüncü parti servisler, ödeme sistemleri ve harici API entegrasyonlarının yürütülmesi WordPress tabanlı kullanıcı arayüzleri ile özel yazılım sistemleri arasında entegrasyon sağlanması Aranan Nitelikler PHP & MySQL konusunda ileri seviye bilgi sahibi Laravel framework’ü ile aktif ve profesyonel proje tecrübesi olan AngularJS veya benzeri JavaScript tabanlı admin panel yapılarıyla çalışma deneyimi Legacy sistemlerin modern framework’lere (özellikle Laravel) taşınması konusunda tecrübeli Mobil uygulama geliştirme süreçlerinde deneyimli (Flutter, React Native veya benzeri teknolojilerle geliştirme yapmış ya da bu süreçleri backend tarafında uçtan uca yönetmiş) Mobil uygulamalarla entegre çalışan backend servisleri ve API’ler geliştirmiş AWS veya benzeri sunucu sistemlerinde (EC2, S3, RDS vb.) deneyimli HTML, CSS, JavaScript, jQuery, Bootstrap teknolojilerine hâkim API geliştirme ve entegrasyon süreçlerinde tecrübeli Minimum 5 yıl profesyonel yazılım geliştirme tecrübesi Freelance ve proje bazlı çalışma disiplinine uygun Sorumluluk sahibi, güvenilir ve çözüm odaklı Teknik dokümanları okuyabilecek düzeyde İngilizce bilgisi İş Birliği ve Ödeme Modeli Çalışma modeli freelance ve proje bazlıdır İş başlangıcında karşılıklı sözleşme yapılır Ödemeler, proje teslimi ve test süreçlerinin onaylanmasının ardından gerçekleştirilir Projeler yılın belirli dönemlerinde düzenli olarak geliştirilmektedir Uzun vadeli, karşılıklı güvene dayalı iş birlikleri önceliklidir

title: Full Stack Engineer
description: We’re Hiring: Full-Stack Software Developer (Restaurant Tech / B2B SaaS Platform) We are expanding our tech team at Mizanplus , where we build high-performance restaurant technologies, order orchestration systems, and supplier integrations used by ghost kitchens and multi-brand food operators. We’re now looking for a Full-Stack Software Developer who will help us evolve both our Paketmaster SaaS and Tedarikçi (Supplier) SaaS platforms — including real-time product synchronization, multi-platform integrations, and highly scalable order pipelines. What You’ll Work On Building features across our SaaS platforms (restaurant management, supplier integrations, product sync flows) Designing and implementing REST / gRPC APIs Improving performance of large-scale data collectors Developing UI features on our frontends Contributing to core system architecture: queues, asynchronous pipelines, data consistency, and distributed workers What We’re Looking For Must-Haves 2–5 years of experience in backend or full-stack development Strong knowledge of Python & Django Experience with distributed task architectures Solid understanding of PostgreSQL , database optimization & transactions Experience with REST APIs + modern frontends (React / Next.js) Familiarity with Docker and container-based deployments Ability to write clean, maintainable, testable code Nice to Have Experience with queue-driven architecture or event-driven systems Knowledge of threading , concurrency, and async patterns Experience building integrations with external APIs Understanding of high-scale architecture, caching and performance tuning Who You Are You care about building reliable, scalable systems — not just shipping code You’re comfortable owning a feature from idea to deployment You enjoy problem-solving, debugging, and optimizing You’re proactive, curious, and eager to learn You like startup-level speed and responsibility What We Offer Chance to work on real-time, high-throughput food-tech systems Small, talented engineering team directly impacting product direction Remote-friendly work culture Fast-moving environment with ownership and growth opportunities If you’d like to work on meaningful, technically challenging systems in the food-tech space, we’d love to talk. Apply or message us directly! Hiring Manager is Mert Salık. ﻿ Don't forget to follow Mizanplus & PaketMaster pages!

title: Full Stack NodeJS Developer
description: About the Job Company Description OBSS is Turkey’s largest technology consultancy, pioneering product development and technology consulting for an AI-native future. With more than 20 years of experience and offices in Istanbul, Ankara, London, Amsterdam, and Baku, we empower leading companies in banking and finance, insurance, e-commerce, retail, and the start-up ecosystem. Our team of over 1000 talented professionals thrives on collaboration, innovation, and continuous learning. We are now looking for a Full Stack NodeJS Developer to join us and contribute to building high-quality, end-to-end solutions that create real business impact. OBSS is looking for a Full Stack NodeJS Developer to join our dynamic team and contribute to delivering end-to-end software solutions across diverse industries. You will work on cutting-edge projects, collaborating with cross-functional teams to design, develop, and maintain high-quality applications that solve real business problems. Main Responsibilities Develop and maintain full-stack applications using Node.js, TypeScript, and React/Next.js with clean, efficient, and scalable code. Design and implement high-performance backend services using Fastify, ensuring low latency and high throughput. Manage real-time data streaming and caching strategies using Kafka and Redis. Build, containerize, and orchestrate applications using Docker and Kubernetes to ensure seamless deployment across environments. Integrate and manage database layers using TypeORM, ensuring data integrity and optimized queries. Implement and monitor system performance and tracing using OpenTelemetry to maintain high system reliability. Conduct thorough code reviews and ensure the codebase meets quality, security, and efficiency standards. Communicate technical concepts clearly and effectively to both technical teams and cross-functional stakeholders. Stay current with emerging technologies and best practices, suggesting innovations to improve system architecture and developer experience. Qualifications / Technical Skills Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering, Computer Science, or a related field. Minimum 3 years of hands-on experience in Node.js development. Strong proficiency in TypeScript and modern JavaScript patterns. Deep understanding of React and Next.js for frontend development. Proven experience with Fastify framework (preferred) or Express. Experience with message brokers and caching layers, specifically Kafka and Redis. Familiarity with ORM tools, preferably TypeORM. Solid knowledge of Docker and Kubernetes orchestration. Familiarity with observability tools and standards, such as OpenTelemetry, is a plus. Proficient in Git version control and collaborative workflows. Experience working with relational databases (SQL) and database design. Strong communication and interpersonal skills. Result-oriented team player with analytical problem-solving abilities. Fluency in written and spoken English. Ability to approach AI with curiosity and intention, actively incorporating AI-powered tools into workflows to enhance productivity and drive innovation. Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Senior Full Stack Developer
description: We are looking for a highly experienced Senior Fullstack Developer to join our growing technology team and contribute to globally focused healthcare and AI-driven products. For us, this role is far beyond simply writing code. We are looking for someone who takes ownership of the product, contributes to technical decision-making, builds scalable systems, and approaches software engineering with a strong sense of quality and craftsmanship. Responsibilities Design and develop scalable, sustainable, and modern software solutions Take an active role in end-to-end development processes using .NET Core and Angular Build high-performance systems aligned with microservices architecture principles Develop secure, testable, and maintainable backend and frontend applications Contribute actively to code review, Git workflows, and CI/CD processes Produce technical documentation and support a strong knowledge-sharing culture Collaborate closely with product and technical teams in architectural decisions Contribute to products solving real-world problems with measurable impact Qualifications Degree in Computer Engineering or a related field Minimum 10 years of software development experience Advanced knowledge of RESTful API development with .NET Core Strong experience with Angular (v13+) and modern responsive SPA development Solid understanding of microservices architecture Experience with Docker and Kubernetes Strong knowledge of MSSQL and Entity Framework Core Experience working with Agile / Scrum methodologies Good command of English communication skills Analytical mindset with a solution-oriented and responsible approach Passion for software quality, scalability, and maintainability Nice to Have Experience with cloud platforms such as Azure or AWS Experience writing unit and integration tests Knowledge of performance optimization and application security Experience with domain-driven design (DDD) or event-driven architectures German language skills are considered a strong plus What We Offer A production-focused and strong engineering environment based in Izmir Opportunity to contribute to globally used products and platforms Real ownership in product development processes A culture where technical ideas and initiative are valued A trust-based and collaborative working environment Continuous learning and professional growth opportunities Long-term career potential in healthcare technologies and AI-driven systems If you want to see the real-world impact of the products you build and become part of a strong engineering culture, we would be excited to meet you.

Additional Informations : Professional Growth & Learning As a tech company, we focus on reskilling and upskilling to support career growth. We offer a personalized Individual Growth Program (IGP), where employees set clear goals for each half of the year. These goals may include trainings, certifications, and personal development milestones, creating a structured roadmap for continuous improvement. The IGP helps employees strengthen both technical and soft skills, ensuring steady professional advancement. Company Culture and Values We celebrate diversity, inclusion, and equal opportunity, fostering a collaborative environment where innovation can flourish. Our culture emphasizes mentorship, knowledge sharing, and active participation in tech communities, workshops, and team events. This vibrant atmosphere empowers employees to contribute their best while feeling supported and valued. Benefits and Perks We provide competitive salaries, flexible and hybrid working arrangements, and a wide range of opportunities for growth through training programs, certifications, and workshops. In addition, we offer initiatives designed to build a supportive and engaging workplace where curiosity and collaboration are encouraged. These benefits ensure that employees feel motivated, empowered, and equipped to reach their full potential.

title: Senior Backend Developer / AI-First
description: About Kaizen Kaizen Technology is a fast-growing B2B SaaS company building loyalty and engagement platforms that drive measurable user behavior and business growth. Operating across Istanbul and London, we work with leading brands such as Anadolu Efes, Ferrero, Nestlé, and Coca-Cola, reaching over 15 million users through our platforms. What This Role Is A deeply technical backend engineering role, scalable APIs, event-driven systems, multi-tenant architecture, cloud-native infrastructure. But it's more than writing great backend code. AI tools are already in use across our team. Your job is to take that further: build the workflows, set the standards, and mentor engineers so that AI-augmented development becomes the norm not the exception. We're not looking for someone who uses AI well alone. We're looking for someone who makes the whole team better at it. What You'll Work On Designing and building scalable .NET backend services powering loyalty, rewards, and gamification flows Evolving our multi-tenant SaaS architecture for performance and maintainability Integrating AI-assisted tooling into development workflows; code generation, refactoring, testing, documentation Working with event systems (RabbitMQ / Azure Service Bus) and distributed architectures Collaborating closely with the CTO and FE team on platform decisions What We're Looking For Hard requirements: 5-8 years of backend engineering experience in production environments Strong hands-on expertise in .NET / C# Active daily use of AI development tools (GitHub Copilot, ChatGPT, Cursor, or similar) Awareness of AI limitations and hallucinations, you know when to trust the output and when to validate it Proven experience with scalable API design and distributed systems Solid understanding of SQL (SQL Server preferred), caching (Redis), and ORM tools (EF Core) Cloud experience: Azure or AWS (hands-on, not just familiarity) CI/CD and DevOps comfort — you've deployed, monitored, debugged in production Strong plus: Experience with multi-tenant SaaS architecture LLM API integration (OpenAI, Azure OpenAI) Kubernetes / containerized environments Messaging systems: Kafka, RabbitMQ, Azure Service Bus Experience in loyalty, marketing automation, or engagement platforms What We Offer Opportunity to shape a growing global SaaS platform Direct impact on products used by millions of users A product-driven engineering culture Close collaboration with product, UX and engineering teams Ownership-oriented working environment Opportunity to work on scalable cloud-native platform systems What’s in It for You? 🌍 Remote-friendly – Work from anywhere 💰 Competitive salary + performance-based bonus – Your success is rewarded! 🌟 Flexible benefits – Spend it on what fits your lifestyle, whether it’s wellness, sports, or insurance for your furry companion. 📚 Learning & development opportunities – Grow with us. 🎉 A fun, dynamic team – Work with smart, driven people who love what they do.

title: Senior Backend Rust Developer
description: About us: Talent has no borders. Proxify's mission is to connect top developers around the world with the opportunities they deserve. So, it doesn't matter where you are; we are here to help you fast-track your independent career in the right direction. Since our launch, Proxify's developers have successfully worked with 1200+ happy clients to build their products and growth features. 5000+ talented developers trust Proxify and its network to fulfill their dreams and objectives. Proxify is shaped by a global network of supportive, talented developers interested in remote full-time jobs. Our Glassdoor (4.5/5) and Trustpilot (4.8/5) ratings reflect the trust developers place in us and our commitment to our members' success. The Role: We are looking for a Senior Backend Rust Developer to join one of our high-growth client teams as a technical lead for their core systems. In an era where performance and memory safety are non-negotiable, you will be responsible for architecting and building low-latency, high-throughput services that serve as the backbone of the client's platform. You will lead the transition from legacy services to high-performance Rust microservices, leveraging the ownership model to eliminate data races and ensure memory safety. This is a role for a developer who loves "getting close to the metal" while maintaining the productivity of a modern web stack. What we are looking for: Professional experience building production-grade applications in Rust. You should have a deep understanding of ownership, borrowing, lifetimes, and the Send/Sync traits. Strong experience with the Tokio ecosystem and asynchronous programming patterns. Proficiency with modern Rust web frameworks such as Axum, Actix-web, or Rocket. Proven ability to design distributed systems using gRPC, Protocol Buffers, and message brokers like Kafka or RabbitMQ. Advanced knowledge of SQL (PostgreSQL preferred) and experience with asynchronous ORMs or query builders like sqlx or Diesel. Hands-on experience with containerization (Docker/K8s) and deploying Rust services to cloud environments (AWS/Azure/GCP). Experience with profiling tools (e.g., flamegraph, valgrind) to identify and resolve bottlenecks in high-load scenarios. Strong verbal and written English; comfortable leading technical discussions with cross-functional stakeholders. Time zone: CET (+/- 3 hours). We are unable to consider applications from candidates in other time zones. Nice-to-Have: Experience with WebAssembly (Wasm) for edge computing or browser-based logic. Knowledge of Infrastructure as Code (Terraform/Pulumi). Familiarity with "Unsafe Rust" and when (and when not) to use it. Background in low-level systems languages like C or C++. Responsibilities: Design and implement highly performant backend services that are robust, maintainable, and type-safe. Lead the shift toward memory-safe distributed systems, ensuring zero-cost abstractions are utilized effectively. Conduct rigorous code reviews, emphasizing idiomatic Rust ("Rustacean" style) and safety best practices. Architect secure and scalable RESTful and gRPC APIs for consumption by frontend and mobile applications. Maintain high code quality through comprehensive unit, integration, and property-based testing. What we offer: Get paid, not played No more unreliable clients. Enjoy on-time monthly payments with flexible withdrawal options. Predictable project hours Enjoy a harmonious work-life balance with consistent 8-hour working days with clients. Flex days, so you can recharge Enjoy up to 24 flex days off per year without losing pay, for full-time positions found through Proxify. Career-accelerating positions at cutting-edge companies Discover exclusive long-term remote positions at the world's most exciting companies. Hand-picked opportunities just for you Skip the typical recruitment roadblocks and biases with personally matched positions. One seamless process, multiple opportunities A one-time contracting process for endless opportunities, with no extra assessments. Compensation Enjoy the same pay, every month with positions landed through Proxify.

title: PHP Developer
description: PHP Developer Full Remote Role Description As a PHP Developer at our customer, you will play a key role in developing and maintaining software solutions. Leveraging your expertise in backend, frontend, and infrastructure development, you will contribute to every development lifecycle stage. We seek a professional with strong technical skills, a collaborative mindset, and a commitment to delivering high-quality, sustainable solutions. Key Responsibilities Develop, test, and maintain scalable software applications. Collaborate with cross-functional teams to design innovative solutions. Optimize application performance and system architecture. Ensure high code quality and maintainability through adherence to best practices. Skillset RequirementsBackend Development: Proficient in PHP with extensive experience in Symfony Framework . Skilled in using PHPSpec for behavior-driven development and PHPStan for static code analysis. Strong knowledge of MySQL for efficient database management. Experience with Redis for caching and session management. Frontend Development: Proficient in JavaScript with hands-on experience in modern frameworks. Expertise in VueJS or NuxtJS for building interactive and scalable front-end applications. API Development: Strong experience in reading and writing OpenAPI Specifications (OAS) for API design and documentation. Proficient in GraphQL for writing queries, mutations, and subscriptions. DevOps & Infrastructure: Hands-on experience with Docker for containerization and managing environments. Familiarity with CI/CD pipelines for automating build, test, and deployment workflows. Key Competencies Strong knowledge of software development best practices, including SOLID principles and design patterns. Proficient in version control systems like Git . Familiarity with testing frameworks and tools. Strong problem-solving skills with attention to detail and a focus on code quality. Experience with scalable system architectures and performance optimization techniques. Soft Skills Excellent written and verbal communication skills in English and Turkish. Ability to work collaboratively in a team-oriented environment. Application Process: If you meet the requirements of this role and would like to find out more about this opportunity, please apply to role with an updated CV.

title: Kıdemli Yazılım Geliştirme Uzmanı (PHP)
description: Türkiye'nin en büyük ve en yenilikçi gruplarından olan, her geçen gün farklı sektörlerde aldığı yatırım kararları ile öne çıkan Turkuvaz Medya Grubu çatısı altında, sektöründe hızla büyüyen pazaryeri şirketimiz idefix.com’da görevlendirilmek üzere KIDEMLİ PHP YAZILIM GELİŞTİRME UZMANI arayışımız bulunmaktadır. GENEL NİTELİKLER PHP ile backend geliştirme konusunda en az 5 yıl profesyonel deneyim sahibi, Symfony, Laravel veya benzeri modern PHP frameworklerinden en az birinde deneyimli, RESTful API geliştirme konusunda deneyimli, Nesneye yönelik programlama (OOP) prensiplerine hakim, PostgreSQL, MySQL veya benzeri ilişkisel veritabanları ile uygulama geliştirmiş, Veritabanı ile verimli çalışan ve performans odaklı sorgular yazabilen, Cache ve asenkron işleme mekanizmaları ile çalışma deneyimi olan (Redis, Kafka, RabbitMQ vb.), Git versiyon kontrol sistemi ile aktif geliştirme deneyimine sahip, Production ortamında çalışan backend servisleri geliştirmiş ve bu sistemlerin sürdürülebilirliğine katkı sağlamış, Kod kalitesi, okunabilirlik ve sürdürülebilirlik konularına önem veren, Analitik düşünebilen ve problem çözme yeteneği güçlü, Takım çalışmasına yatkın ve sorumluluk sahibi, Yüksek trafikli sistemlerde geliştirme deneyimi, E-ticaret veya pazaryeri projelerinde görev almış. İŞ TANIMI Backend servislerinin tasarlanması, geliştirilmesi ve sürdürülebilir şekilde iyileştirilmesinde aktif rol almak, Yeni özelliklerin teknik tasarım, geliştirme ve canlıya alma süreçlerine katkı sağlamak, Mevcut backend sistemlerinin performans, stabilite ve sürdürülebilirliğini artırmaya yönelik iyileştirmeler yapmak, Ölçeklenebilir, bakımı kolay ve sürdürülebilir backend çözümleri geliştirmek, Kod kalitesini korumak amacıyla code review süreçlerine katılmak ve ekip içi teknik standartlara katkı sağlamak, Üretim ortamında karşılaşılan teknik sorunların analiz edilmesi ve çözümüne katkı sağlamak, Mevcut kod tabanını anlayarak gerektiğinde refactor etmek ve teknik borcun azaltılmasına katkıda bulunmak, Backend sistemlerinin güvenilir ve öngörülebilir şekilde çalışmasını sağlamak için gerekli geliştirmeleri yapmak, Ürün, frontend ve diğer teknik ekip üyeleri ile birlikte çalışarak teknik çözümler geliştirmek, Yazılan kodun performans, doğruluk ve sürdürülebilirlik açısından sorumluluğunu almak.

title: Full-Stack Engineer (Vue.js & Laravel - Backend Heavy) — Remote
description: Before jumping into all the information about the role and what you can bring to the table, let us introduce ourselves real quick. About Us Insider One is the #1 platform that brings everything marketing and customer engagement teams need in one place so they can reach their peak potential and become unstoppable. Our story began with six desks and a vision to create a single platform to make industry-first technologies and emerging channels accessible to marketers worldwide. Today, Insider One is powered by 1,500+ team members representing 50+ nationalities across 30+ offices. With AI at its core and an integrated Customer Data Platform (CDP), Insider One unites data, personalization, and journey orchestration across the most extensive set of natively supported channels, including WhatsApp, SMS, Email, Web, App, and Site Search. We recently raised one of the largest funding rounds in the industry, a $500M Series E led by General Atlantic. We are backed by top-notch investors, including Sequoia Capital, QIA, Riverwood, and Endeavor Catalyst, and trusted by 2000+ customers from high-growth startups to the most prestigious Fortune 500 companies such as Samsung, Nike, L’Oreal, Singapore Airlines, Nestlé, Nissan, Lenovo, Puma, IKEA, Allianz, Domino's, and the list goes on. Insider One was congratulated for becoming one of the only woman-founded, women-led B2B SaaS unicorns in the world. Loved by customers, recognized by analysts, we are the only vendor recognized as the #1 leader in all the capabilities marketing and customer engagement teams need. Don’t just take our word for it — see for yourself. We consistently outperform and continue our leadership, and the results speak for themselves. From day one, Insider One’s mission has not only been to build a world-class product company, but also to create one of the most socially progressive technology communities in the world. Through our social responsibility initiatives like 100 Social Responsibility Projects, AI Training for Teachers, Code Academy, SheCodes, SheLeads, and SheMarkables , our community has committed to scaling its impact on our communities across 30+ countries, driving initiatives in health, education, farming, animal rights, and increasing women’s representation in STEM. Behind all these achievements is an exceptionally talented, visionary team of overachievers that moves fast and agile, creating cutting-edge products, and focuses on making an impact. If you want to be a part of this journey, just keep reading. And now? Now we are looking for a Senior Software Engineer who will help our team create and implement a wide variety of web-based products using PHP and Go or Node.js, and who wants to take their career one step further. If you think you are one of those people, here you will have the chance to work with the world's leading brands using Artificial Intelligence & Machine Learning technologies. Right now, while you are reading this, we are sending an average of 2.2 billion requests and almost 2 billion instant notifications to more than 450 servers a day. On the Artificial Intelligence and Predictive side, we have more than 100 TB of historical data. We do not wait for jobs or opportunities to come to our feet — we create them. We have now reached 25% of global users. If all of this interests you, read on for more! Our Engineers and Software Developers always think with an innovative perspective, taking advantage of the inexhaustible power of the digital world. They create impressive and intelligent products like true artists. Our Product and Development teams are located in our Istanbul and Ankara offices, so we produce and develop the technology we export to the world in our own country. As Insider One, we believe in cooperation and in adapting the innovations brought by technology by acting fast. We work closely with other departments with agile teams, and we are not afraid of getting our hands dirty. As we said, we do not wait for jobs or opportunities to come to our feet — we create them ourselves. You can check our Tech Stacks here! What You Will Do Develops programs, applications, and websites using PHP (Laravel) together with Vue.js or native JavaScript Improves the performance, scalability, and availability of our systems Develops cutting-edge web applications with a user-centric approach Troubleshoots issues as they arise and proactively anticipates and addresses potential problems Collaborates with co-developers and other relevant departments to ensure maximum efficiency and deliver world-class results Provides regular updates on project status to relevant stakeholders Evaluates and takes on tasks based on resolution priority and the company’s broader vision and goals What You Will Need Have a Bachelor’s degree in Computer Engineering or a related field Have 4+ years of experience in software product development Have hands-on experience with PHP (Laravel) and Vue.js or native JavaScript Have experience developing applications using Object-Oriented Programming (OOP) principles Have experience building component-based front-end architectures Have a solid understanding of MySQL and/or NoSQL technologies such as Redis Have hands-on experience with Docker Are familiar with source control tools such as Git Have experience deploying applications and sharing code repositories (GitHub, GitLab, or Bitbucket) Have experience leading technical projects, prioritizing work, identifying dependencies, and facilitating technical decision-making and cross-functional discussions Have a good command of both Turkish and English Have hands-on experience with AWS (a plus) What We Offer Enjoy a monthly meal allowance designed to enhance your daily routine Access comprehensive private health insurance Feed your curiosity with access to Spotify, LinkedIn Learning, Blinkist, MasterClass, Neoskola, and CloudGuru Level up with internal trainings covering AI fundamentals, coding, foreign languages, and a wide range of personal development skills Be part of a diverse team that’s as global as it gets, where every voice is heard and 50+ nationalities build together Become a Shareowner through our eligibility-based “ESOP” and own a piece of what you build Help build the team you want to work with and enjoy rewarding referral bonuses Opportunities to give back to your community through volunteering and purpose-driven social impact projects From global retreats to team-building activities, expect year-round events that turn into lifelong memories Get inspired by the greatest minds in the tech industry through events like our Tech & Dev Talks Work from anywhere in Turkey through our fully remote setup We aren't just hiring for a position; we are hiring for a mission — a mission to build a lasting legacy that will set the benchmark for the most progressive tech companies out there. To do this, we are looking for exceptional talent to join a community of good-hearted individuals who take high ownership and are relentlessly driven to go the extra mile. If this sounds like who you are and where you aspire to be, we are excited to meet you. We may use artificial intelligence (AI) tools to support parts of the hiring process, such as reviewing applications, analyzing resumes, or assessing responses. These tools assist our recruitment team but do not replace human judgment. Final hiring decisions are ultimately made by humans. If you would like more information about how your data is processed, please contact us.
